mapper.select: SELECT relation_id, relation_type, user_a, user_b, role_type, is_primary, permission_level, status, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM t_user_relation WHERE user_b = #{kidId} AND relation_type = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY is_primary DESC, create_time ASC

SELECT relation_id, relation_type, user_a, user_b, role_type, is_primary, permission_level, status, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM t_user_relation WHERE user_a = #{parentId} AND relation_type = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY is_primary DESC, create_time ASC
